series_metadata.series_description: This includes support information including material test worksheets, monitor reports, verification acceptance tests, contractor tests. The MATERIAL TEST WORKSHEETS contain the hand written notations, internal lab numbers and test results obtained by ODOT technicians during the physical testing of a sample of a Producer/Supplier''s material.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper until scanned, then destroy paper ; Electronic: Retain on electronic database until the project site is no longer utilized by ODOT., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Other
